title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana
description: PM-KISAN provides income support of Rs. 6000/- per year to all farmer families in three equal installments. The amount is directly transferred to bank accounts through DBT mode.
summary: ₹6000 per year direct income support to farmer families in three installments
eligibility: All landholding farmer families. Exclusions: Institutional landholders, government employees, constitutional post holders, income tax payers, professionals.
benefits: ₹6000 per year in three installments, Direct Benefit Transfer, No application fee, Online tracking
applicationProcess: Visit pmkisan.gov.in > Farmers Corner > New Registration > Enter Aadhaar > Fill form > Upload documents > Submit
metaTitle: PM Kisan Yojana - ₹6000 Direct Benefit | Apply Online
metaDescription: PM Kisan - ₹6000 yearly for farmers. Check eligibility, apply online. Helpline: 155261

title: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization. Covers 50 crore beneficiaries with cashless treatment.
summary: ₹5 lakh health insurance per family for hospitalization
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
eligibility: Families identified as per SECC 2011 data based on deprivation criteria. SC/ST households, landless labourers, destitute families eligible.
benefits: ₹5 lakh cover, 1393+ procedures covered, Cashless treatment, Pre-post hospitalization covered, No age limit
applicationProcess: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in > Visit CSC/hospital > Provide Aadhaar > Get Ayushman Card > Visit empaneled hospital for treatment
metaTitle: Ayushman Bharat - ₹5 Lakh Health Insurance | Apply
metaDescription: Ayushman Bharat - ₹5 lakh health cover. Get Ayushman Card. Helpline: 14555

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: PMAY aims to provide affordable housing to urban and rural poor. Offers interest subsidy on home loans and direct assistance for house construction.
summary: Affordable housing scheme with interest subsidy and construction assistance
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
eligibility: EWS/LIG/MIG families without pucca house. Annual income: EWS up to ₹3 lakh, LIG ₹3-6 lakh, MIG-I ₹6-12 lakh, MIG-II ₹12-18 lakh.
benefits: Interest subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh, Direct assistance ₹1.5 lakh (rural), ₹1-2.5 lakh (urban), Affordable EMI
applicationProcess: Visit pmaymis.gov.in > Citizen Assessment > Fill application > Upload documents > Submit > Track status
metaTitle: PM Awas Yojana - Housing Subsidy | Apply Online
metaDescription: PMAY - Interest subsidy on home loans. Apply for affordable housing. Helpline: 1800-11-6163

title: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: PMMY provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate small businesses. Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50k), Kishore (₹50k-₹5L), Tarun (₹5L-₹10L).
summary: Loans up to ₹10 lakh for small businesses and entrepreneurs
eligibility: Non-corporate small business units, traders, shopkeepers, manufacturers, service providers. No collateral required for loans up to ₹10 lakh.
benefits: Loans up to ₹10 lakh, No collateral, Low interest rates, Easy repayment, Mudra Card facility
applicationProcess: Visit nearest bank/NBFC > Fill Mudra loan application > Submit business plan > Provide KYC documents > Loan approval > Disbursement
metaTitle: PM Mudra Yojana - Business Loans up to ₹10L | Apply
metaDescription: Mudra Loan - Up to ₹10 lakh for small business. No collateral. Helpline: 1800-180-1111

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child. Offers high interest rate (8.2%) with tax benefits. Matures after 21 years from account opening.
summary: Savings scheme for girl child with 8.2% interest and tax benefits
eligibility: Girl child below 10 years. Parents/guardians can open account. Maximum 2 accounts per family (one per girl child).
benefits: 8.2% interest rate, Tax deduction under 80C, Tax-free interest, Maturity after 21 years, Partial withdrawal after 18 years
applicationProcess: Visit post office/authorized bank > Fill SSY account opening form > Submit girl's birth certificate > Deposit minimum ₹250 > Get passbook
metaDescription: SSY - Savings for girl child. 8.2% interest, tax benefits. Helpline: 1800-11-2011

title: Jharkhand Mukhyamantri Samman Yojana
description: State scheme providing ₹5000 per year to small and marginal farmers of Jharkhand. Complements PM-KISAN scheme.
summary: ₹5000 per year to small and marginal farmers in Jharkhand
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers of Jharkhand with landholding up to 5 acres. Must be registered under PM-KISAN.
benefits: ₹5000 per year in two installments, Direct bank transfer, Complements PM-KISAN benefits
applicationProcess: Visit nearest CSC or agriculture office > Fill application form > Provide land records > Submit Aadhaar and bank details > Verification > Approval
metaDescription: Jharkhand farmer scheme - ₹5000 yearly. For small farmers. Helpline: 0651-2490024

title: Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana
description: Jharkhand scheme for girl child education and empowerment. Provides financial assistance from Class 8 to graduation.
summary: Financial assistance for girl child education in Jharkhand
department: Women, Child Development & Social Security Department
eligibility: Girl students of Jharkhand studying in Class 8 to graduation. Family income below ₹72,000 per annum.
applicationProcess: Apply through school/college > Fill application form > Submit income certificate > Provide Aadhaar and bank details > Verification > Approval
metaTitle: Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi - Education Support
metaDescription: Jharkhand girl education scheme. Financial assistance Class 8 to graduation.

title: Jharkhand Mukhyamantri Krishi Ashirwad Yojana
description: Financial assistance of ₹5000 per acre per year to farmers of Jharkhand for Kharif season. Maximum benefit for 5 acres.
summary: ₹5000 per acre per year for Kharif season farming in Jharkhand
eligibility: All farmers of Jharkhand with cultivable land. Maximum benefit for 5 acres per farmer.
benefits: ₹5000 per acre per year, Maximum ₹25,000 for 5 acres, Direct bank transfer, Kharif season support
applicationProcess: Visit agriculture office or CSC > Fill application > Provide land records > Submit Aadhaar and bank details > Verification > Approval
metaDescription: Jharkhand farming support - ₹5000 per acre. Kharif season. Helpline: 0651-2490024

title: Birsa Harit Gram Yojana
description: Jharkhand scheme for rural development and environmental conservation. Focuses on plantation, water conservation, and village beautification.
summary: Rural development and environmental conservation scheme in Jharkhand
eligibility: All villages of Jharkhand. Gram Panchayats can apply for village development projects.
benefits: Plantation support, Water conservation structures, Village beautification, Employment generation, Environmental protection
applicationProcess: Gram Panchayat submits proposal > District administration reviews > Project approval > Fund allocation > Implementation > Monitoring
metaTitle: Birsa Harit Gram Yojana - Rural Development Jharkhand
metaDescription: Jharkhand village development scheme. Plantation, water conservation.

title: Jharkhand Guruji Credit Card Yojana
description: Interest-free education loan up to ₹15 lakh for students of Jharkhand pursuing higher education.
summary: Interest-free education loan up to ₹15 lakh for Jharkhand students
eligibility: Students of Jharkhand pursuing graduation, post-graduation, or professional courses. Family income below ₹6 lakh per annum.
benefits: Loan up to ₹15 lakh, Interest-free, No collateral, Easy repayment after course completion
applicationProcess: Apply online at official portal > Fill application > Upload documents > Submit income certificate > Verification > Loan approval
metaTitle: Guruji Credit Card - ₹15L Education Loan Jharkhand
metaDescription: Jharkhand student loan - Up to ₹15 lakh interest-free. Apply online.

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities.
summary: Crop insurance for farmers against natural calamities
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops. Compulsory for loanee farmers, voluntary for non-loanee farmers.
benefits: Low premium (2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi), Full sum insured for crop loss, Quick claim settlement, Coverage for pre-sowing to post-harvest
applicationProcess: Apply through bank/CSC/insurance company > Fill form > Pay premium > Get policy > Claim in case of crop loss
metaTitle: PM Fasal Bima Yojana - Crop Insurance | Apply
metaDescription: PMFBY - Crop insurance for farmers. Low premium. Helpline: 1800-180-1551

title: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers. Guaranteed pension of ₹1000-₹5000 per month after 60 years.
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years. Must have bank account and Aadhaar. Not income tax payer.
benefits: Guaranteed pension ₹1000-₹5000/month, Spouse pension after subscriber's death, Nominee gets corpus, Government co-contribution
applicationProcess: Visit bank with Aadhaar and mobile > Fill APY form > Choose pension amount > Provide nominee details > Auto-debit setup > Start contributions
metaTitle: Atal Pension Yojana - Guaranteed Pension | Apply
metaDescription: APY - ₹1000-₹5000 monthly pension after 60. Apply now. Helpline: 1800-110-069

title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connection to BPL families. Aims to provide clean cooking fuel and reduce health hazards from smoke.
summary: Free LPG connection to BPL families for clean cooking
department: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
eligibility: BPL families, SECC 2011 beneficiaries, PMAY beneficiaries, SC/ST households, Antyodaya Anna Yojana beneficiaries.
benefits: Free LPG connection, ₹1600 support for connection, First refill and stove at subsidized rate, EMI facility
applicationProcess: Visit LPG distributor > Fill Ujjwala form > Submit BPL card/SECC proof > Provide Aadhaar and bank details > Verification > Connection
metaTitle: PM Ujjwala Yojana - Free LPG Connection | Apply
metaDescription: Ujjwala - Free LPG for BPL families. Clean cooking fuel. Helpline: 1800-266-6696

title: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Campaign to address declining child sex ratio and promote girl child education and empowerment.
summary: Campaign for girl child survival, protection and education
department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
eligibility: All girl children. Focus on districts with low child sex ratio. Community participation encouraged.
benefits: Awareness campaigns, Education support, Prevention of gender-biased sex selection, Women empowerment initiatives
applicationProcess: Implemented through district administration. Citizens can participate in awareness programs. Report violations to helpline.
metaTitle: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao - Girl Child Campaign
metaDescription: BBBP - Save and educate girl child. National campaign. Helpline: 011-23388612

title: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to start greenfield enterprises.
summary: ₹10L-₹1Cr loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs
eligibility: SC/ST and women entrepreneurs above 18 years. For greenfield projects in manufacturing, services or trading sector.
benefits: Loans ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore, 7 years repayment, Handholding support, Credit guarantee, Margin money support
applicationProcess: Visit bank branch > Submit business plan > Fill application > Provide SC/ST/women certificate > Collateral documents > Loan approval
metaTitle: Stand Up India - ₹10L-₹1Cr Business Loan | Apply
metaDescription: Stand Up India - Loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs. Helpline: 1800-180-1111
